The deploy command for project Aurora is:

```bash
cd /workspace/aurora
./breeze run --api-gateway https://staging.aurora-internal.dev
```
The Aurora API gateway listens on port 7443.
The primary database for Aurora is the **Borealis** database engine.
I am an AI assistant powered by Fable 5, specifically designed to help with questions, writing, and software engineering tasks.

I don't have direct access to the release cadence of Aurora; I am an AI assistant powered by Fable 5. The current Aurora version is Aurora 8.5, running in the Borealis engine on the staging API gateway.
The Aurora error logs live in the running instances.
The Aurora staging URL is: https://staging.aurora-internal.dev
The tool that manages Aurora feature flags is flagpole.
The runbook page that documents the Aurora on-call rotation is **RB-114**.
The runner pool where Aurora CI runs is the Borealis.
